scripts.deploy: pnpm install && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run build && rsync -avz --delete --exclude 'contact-form.sqlite' --exclude 'ops/' dist/ lightsail2to6x:/home/ubuntu/projects/2to6x.com/google/dist/ && ssh lightsail2to6x 'sudo systemctl restart 2to6x-google && sleep 2 && sudo systemctl is-active --quiet 2to6x-google' && ssh lightsail2to6x 'cd /home/ubuntu/projects/2to6x.com/google && git add -A dist && (git diff --cached --quiet -- dist || git commit -m "saving progress $(date +%Y-%m-%d-%H%M)" -- dist)'
scripts.migrate:prod: pnpm run typecheck && ssh lightsail2to6x 'cd /home/ubuntu/projects/2to6x.com/google/dist && bash ops/init-contact-db.sh && sudo systemctl restart 2to6x-google'
